panels.description: The time taken after receiving the raw block from DA through State Transition Function and committing to the database

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_runner_times_us" and r._field != "da_height"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r["host"], set: ${host:json}))

if agg_func == "raw" then
  data
else if agg_func == "median" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: median)
else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)
else if agg_func == "p90" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))
else if agg_func == "p99" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column))
else
  data

panels.title: Runner loop times

panels.description:
How much time does it take to process slot, split by following stages:

1. blob_selection
2. begin_hooks
3. blobs_processing
4. end_hooks
5. finalization

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_slot_execution_time_us" and
    r._field != "da_height" and r._field != "rollup_height" and r._field != "visible_slot_number" and r._field != "gas_used_compute" and r._field != "gas_used_mem"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r["host"], set: ${host:json}))
  

if agg_func == "raw" then
   data
else
   data 
    |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: sum)

panels.title: ZK Cycles per call

panels.description:
How much time does it take to run ZK VM

1. blob_selection
2. begin_hooks
3. blobs_processing
4. end_hooks
5. finalization

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sov_rollup_zkvm_proving")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r["host"], set: ${host:json}))

if agg_func == "raw" then
  data
else if agg_func == "median" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: median)
else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)
else if agg_func == "p90" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))
else if agg_func == "p99" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column))
else
  data

panels.title: Proving Time

panels.description: How many ZK cycles happend for each call

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sov_rollup_zkvm" and r._field == "free_heap_bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r["host"], set: ${host:json}))

if agg_func == "raw" then
  data
else if agg_func == "median" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: median)
else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)
else if agg_func == "p90" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))
else if agg_func == "p99" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column))
else
  data

panels.title: ZK Free heap bytes

list.description: Function to aggregate values. Raw means no aggregation
list.label: Aggregation function
list.name: agg_func

list.description: Interval used for aggregating values, if aggregation is specified
list.label: Aggregation Interval
list.name: agg_interval

list.description: Bucket where rollup metrics are placed. Should not start with underscore
list.label: Bucket
list.name: bucket

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"
v1.tagValues(
    bucket: v.bucket,
    tag: "host",
    predicate: (r) => true,
    start: -1d
)
list.name: host

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"
v1.tagValues(
    bucket: v.bucket,
    tag: "host",
    predicate: (r) => true,
    start: -1d
)
